segments.text: Jesus said to his disciples, {
Temptations are unavoidable, but it will be a disaster for those through whom they come!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For such people it would be better to have a millstone hung around the neck and be thrown into the sea than to cause these little ones to sin.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So take care what you do. If your brother sins, warn him; and if he repents, forgive him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Even if he sins against you seven times a day, and seven times comes back and tells you, ‘I'm really sorry,’ forgive him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The apostles said to the Lord, {
Help us to have more trust!
segments.speaker: The apostles

segments.text: The Lord replied, {
Even if your trust was as small as a mustard seed, you could say to this mulberry tree, ‘Uproot yourself, and plant yourself in the sea,’ and it would obey you.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Say you have a servant who does plowing or shepherding. When he comes in from work, do you say to him, ‘Come in and sit down now for a meal’?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: No. You say to him, ‘Prepare a meal for me, get yourself dressed, and serve me until I've finished my meal. After that you can have your meal.’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: And do you thank the servant for doing what you told him? No.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Likewise once you've done everything you were told, you should simply say, ‘We are undeserving servants. We just did our duty.’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: As Jesus continued on his way to Jerusalem, he passed along the border between Samaria and Galilee.
As he entered a particular village, ten lepers met him, standing at a distance.
They called out, {
Jesus, Master, please have mercy on us.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: When Jesus saw them, he said to them, {
Go and show yourselves to the priests.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: [^61] On their way there, they were healed.
One of them when he saw that he was healed, returned to Jesus, shouting praises to God.
He fell down at Jesus' feet, thanking him. He was a Samaritan.
Weren't ten lepers healed?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus asked.
Where are the other nine?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Didn't anyone else come back to praise God—only this foreigner?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus told the man, {
Get up and go on your way. Your trust has healed you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Once, when the Pharisees came and asked him when God's kingdom would come, Jesus replied, {
God's kingdom doesn't come with visible signs that you can observe.
segments.speaker: Once, when the Pharisees came and

segments.text: People won't be saying, ‘Look, it's here’ or ‘Look, it's there,’ for God's kingdom is among you.
segments.speaker: Once, when the Pharisees came and

segments.text: Then Jesus told the disciples, {
The time is coming when you'll long to see the day[^63] when the Son of man comes, but you won't see it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They'll be telling you, ‘Look, there he is,’ or ‘Look, here he is,’ but don't go running off after them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The day when the Son of man comes will be just like lightning that flashes, lighting up the sky from one side to the other.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But first he will have to suffer many things, and be rejected by this generation.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The time when the Son of man comes will be like it was in Noah's day.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: People went on eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage until the day Noah went into the ark. Then the flood came and destroyed them all.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It will be like it was in Lot's day. People went on eating and drinking, buying and selling, planting and building.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But on the day Lot left Sodom, fire and brimstone rained down from heaven and destroyed them all.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The day when the Son of man appears will be just like that.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you're up on the roof that day don't go down and get your things; and if you're out in the fields don't go back home either.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Remember Lot's wife!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you try to hold on to your life you'll lose it; but if you lose your life you'll save it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I tell you, at that time two will be in bed at night; one will be taken and the other left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Two women will be grinding grain, one will be taken; and the other left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Where, Lord?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: they asked.
Where the carcass is, that's where the vultures gather,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied.
